title: The free-stack enrichment fetches facts reliably, but each source has a gap you must handle without fabricating
summary: gate_catalog_enrich reuses the B.1 free-stack connectors (OpenRouter specs+pricing, LLM-Stats benchmarks+perf, Wikidata lineage) that the DF.1 OpenAI pilot exercised end-to-end. The pilot proved the mapping works AND surfaced the gaps a curator agent must handle: (1) Wikidata resolves off the model NAME — if the catalog display_name is an internal id (spidergate_id like 'gpt-4o-openai') the search finds no entity and lineage/website come back empty; leave the gap visible, never invent it. (2) A model delisted from OpenRouter (e.g. o1-mini) has no primary spec source, so context/max_output aren't fetchable; leave null or backfill pricing per-field from the LLM-Stats provider row (a sourced value), never a guess. (3) LLM-Stats benchmarks for a closed vendor are the vendor's own self_reported numbers — honest to store, must be labeled vendor-reported. (4) The enrichment did NOT originally write the flat spec cols (context/max_output/pricing); DF.2 folds that in, COALESCE-guarded (sync/probe wins when set). (5) A provider bucket can be polluted with mislabeled rows (14 GLM/Qwen/etc. sat under provider='openai') — they show up as skipped_no_match; audit + relabel before a provider-wide fill. The through-line: facts are fetched + provenance-stamped or left null; a guessed fact with no provenance is worse than a visible gap because it looks authoritative. Enrich fills FACTS; the copy is authored separately (author-catalog), is_curated-safe. The fleet cron stays dark; enrich is on-demand + bounded (~30 models/call, deferred = catalog_rows - matched).
references: GateBoard DF.2 (feat/gateboard-df2-enrich-agent-native) — the agent-native enrichment: POST /admin/gate/catalog/enrich + gate_catalog_enrich MCP tool + `spideriq gate catalog enrich` CLI, wrapping a scoped CatalogEnrichmentService.run_once with scope_provider/scope_model_ids + _update_catalog_spec

GateBoard DF.1 (task b8f426ad, PR #2373) — the transparent OpenAI catalog-fill pilot; docs/external/catalog-fill-pilot-openai-2026-07-10.md §3 (judgment calls) + §4 (source→field recipe) are where these gaps first surfaced
app/services/gate/catalog_enrichment/{service.py,normalize.py,sources/{openrouter,llm_stats,wikidata}.py} — the free-stack connectors + compose/normalize helpers this skill drives
author-catalog skill (same package) — the WRITE-the-copy half; enrich fills facts, author-catalog writes description/badges/links from them
